title: Zachary Hunter’s CV
text:
Zachary Hunter
Student at BYUI.

mojozach32@gmail.com | My wikipedia page  | Download PDF

Zachary Hunter mojozach32@gmail.com • 716-335-8365 • linkedin.com/in/zachary-hunter-526894329 EDUCATION Bachelor of Science in Computer Science Brigham Young University - Idaho  Sophomore Standing  Relevant Coursework  Programming Fundamentals  Data Structures (planned/in progress)  Computer Systems September 2025 - April 2028 Rexburg, ID PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE Engineering / Technical Intern Astronics April 2022 - May 2022 Buffalo, NY  Undertook an Internship for CADD experience with knowledge and experience from Ormsby CADD education  Assisted engineers with technical and documentation tasks development of invention to make manufacturing team work more efficient  Supported project teams with software and system-related work  Gained exposure to real-world engineering workflows and project development environments Ormsby Education Center Ormsby September 2020 - June 2022 Buffalo, NY  Created and modified technical drawings using AutoCAD  Assisted with drafting and design adjustments for engineering projects  Maintained organized design documentation and revisions MET worker/ full time Home Depot  Trained with a team  Learned socializing skills  Helped team with tasks and work loads Lot worker June 2021 - September 2021 Orchard Park,NY June 2022 - September 2022 Home Depot  Learned how the company is run by workers with customers  Strengthened workers Orchard Park, NY OBJECTIVE Motivated Computer Science student at Brigham Young University seeking an internship or entry-level role where I apply programming, CAD design, and problem-solving skills to real-world technical challenges PROGRAMMING LANGUAGES  Python  C#  HTML  Technical Tools  AutoCAD / CAD Design  Basic Cybersecurity Concepts OTHER SKILLS Problem Solving Team Collaboration Technical Communication LEADERSHIP & SERVICE Church Leadership Service Boy Scouts of America  Achieved Eagle Scout  Planned and executed a community service project requiring leadership, logistics, and team coordination  Developed strong leadership, perseverance, and service values  Held multiple leadership positions in church callings  Organized group activities and service projects  Mentored and supported members of youth and community groups ADDITIONAL INFORMATION  Originally from Buffalo  Interested in software development, cybersecurity, and engineering technology  Strong work ethic with proven leadership and teamwork experienc
